Part.Source:
&CteArqXml = '' if &CaminhoArquivoXml.IsEmpty() &CteArqXml = &ManXmlNfe Else &xmlCTe.Open(&CaminhoArquivoXml) Do While not &xmlCTe.EOF &CteArqXml += &xmlCTe.ReadRawXML() &xmlCTe.Read() Enddo &xmlCTe.Close() Endif
LeituraXmlDacte.Call(&CteArqXml, &SdtXmlCte)
If Not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.CNPJ.IsEmpty() retornaSoNumeros.Call(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.CNPJ, &DestCNPJ) Else retornaSoNumeros.Call(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.CPF, &DestCNPJ) EndIf
&IsNotaPropria = '' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod
retornaSoNumeros.Call(FilCpj, &FilCpj)
If &FilCpj = &DestCNPJ &IsNotaPropria = 'P' &FilCod = FilCod Else &IsNotaPropria = 'T' &FilCod = FilCod Exit EndIf EndFor &CteModCod = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.mod &CteSer = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.serie)// serie &CteNum = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.nCT) //numero If &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.tpAmb = '1' //ambiente produção 1 &FilAmbEms = TAmb.Producao EndIf &CteChv = &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.chCTe //chave cte
If &IsNotaPropria = 'P' For each Order EmpCod, CteNum,CteChv,CteModCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CteNum = &CteNum Where CteChv = &CteChv Where CteModCod = &CteModCod
When None New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod &CteCod = UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Udp(domParCod.CTE, &EmpCod, &FilCod)
CteCod = &CteCod &dhEmi = substr(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.dhEmi,9,2) +'/'+ substr(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.dhEmi,6,2) +'/'+ substr(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.dhEmi,1,4) CteDtaEms = CtoD(&dhEmi)
CteHorEms = substr(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.dhEmi,12,8) If &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.Tpimp = '1' CteProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA Else CteProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS EndIf
CteNum = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.nCT) //CteLctCod =
CteNatOpe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.natOp CteSer = &CteSer Do Case Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '0' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.Normal
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '1' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.Subcontratacao
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '2' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.Redespacho
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '3' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.Redespachointermediario
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '4' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.Multimodal
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '6' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.TransportePessoas
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '7' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.TransporteValores
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '8' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.ExcessoBagagem EndCase
Do Case Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.modal = '01' CteMod = ModalCte.Rodoviario Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.modal = '06' CteMod = ModalCte.Multimodal EndCase
CteCfop = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.CFOP
If &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.indGlobalizado = '1' CteindGlo = true Else CteindGlo = False EndIf
Do Case Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpCTe = '0' CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Normal Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpCTe = '1' CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Complemento Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpCTe = '2' CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Anulacao Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpCTe = '3' CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Substituicao EndCase
CteChv = &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.chCTe CteModCod = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.mod CteIniCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.cMunIni) CteIniCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.xmunIni CteIniUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.UFIni CteTerCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.cMunFim) CteTerCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.xMunFim CteTerUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.UFFim If &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.retira = '1' CteIndRec = IndicaRecebedor.Sim Else CteIndRec = IndicaRecebedor.Nao EndIf
CteIndRecDes = ''
Do Case Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.indIEToma = '1' CtePapTom = PaPelTomador.ContribuinteICMS
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.indIEToma = '2' CtePapTom = PaPelTomador.ContribuinteIsento
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.indIEToma = '9' CtePapTom = PaPelTomador.NaoContribuinte EndCase
&PesCnpj = '' Do Case Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.toma04.toma = '4' // Outros CteTomSer = Tomador.Outros If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.CNPJ.IsEmpty() CteTomCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.CNPJ &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.CNPJ Else CteTomCpf = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.CPF &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.CPF EndIf
Do 'GetPessoa' CteTomCod = &PEsCod
CteTomInsEst = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.IE CteTomRaz = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.xNome CteTomFan = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.xFant CteTomFon = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.fone CteTomLog = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.xLgr CteTomNro = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.nro CteTomCpl= &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.xCpl CteTomBai = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.xBairro CteTomCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.cMun) CteTomCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.xMun CteTomCep = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.CEP CteTomUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.UF CteTomPaiCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.cPais) CteTomPaiNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.xPais CteTomEml = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.email
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.toma03.toma = '0' // Remetente CteTomSer = Tomador.Remetente If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.CNPJ.IsEmpty() CteTomCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.CNPJ &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.CNPJ Else CteTomCpf = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.CPF &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.CPF EndIf Do 'GetPessoa' CteTomCod = &PEsCod CteTomInsEst = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.IE CteTomRaz = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.xNome CteTomFan = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.xFant CteTomFon = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.fone CteTomLog = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.xLgr CteTomNro = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.nro CteTomCpl= &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.xCpl CteTomBai = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.xBairro CteTomCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.cMun) CteTomCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.xMun CteTomCep = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.CEP CteTomUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.UF CteTomPaiCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.cPais) CteTomPaiNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.xPais CteTomEml = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.email
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.toma03.toma = '3' // Destinatario CteTomSer = Tomador.Destinatario If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CNPJ.IsEmpty() CteTomCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CNPJ &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CNPJ Else CteTomCpf = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CPF &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CPF EndIf Do 'GetPessoa' CteTomCod = &PEsCod
CteTomInsEst = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.IE CteTomRaz = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.xNome CteTomFon = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.fone CteTomLog = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xLgr CteTomNro = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.nro CteTomCpl= &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xCpl CteTomBai = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xBairro CteTomCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.cMun) CteTomCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xMun CteTomCep = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.CEP CteTomUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.UF CteTomPaiCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.cPais) CteTomPaiNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xPais CteTomEml = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.email
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.toma03.toma = '1' // Expedidor CteTomSer = Tomador.Expedidor If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CNPJ.IsEmpty() CteTomCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CNPJ &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CNPJ Else CteTomCpf = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CPF &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CPF EndIf Do 'GetPessoa' CteTomCod = &PEsCod CteTomInsEst = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.IE CteTomRaz = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.xNome CteTomFon = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.fone CteTomLog = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.xLgr CteTomNro = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderexped.nro CteTomCpl= &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderexped.xCpl CteTomBai = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderexped.xBairro CteTomCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderexped.cMun) CteTomCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderexped.xMun CteTomCep = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderexped.CEP CteTomUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderexped.UF CteTomPaiCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderexped.cPais) CteTomPaiNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderexped.xPais CteTomEml = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.email
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.toma03.toma = '2' // Recebedor CteTomSer = Tomador.Recebedor If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CNPJ.IsEmpty() CteTomCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CNPJ &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CNPJ Else CteTomCpf = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CPF &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CPF EndIf Do 'GetPessoa' CteTomCod = &PesCod CteTomInsEst = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.IE CteTomRaz = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.xNome CteTomFon = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.fone CteTomLog = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderreceb.xLgr CteTomNro = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderreceb.nro CteTomCpl= &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderreceb.xCpl CteTomBai = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderreceb.xBairro CteTomCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderreceb.cMun) CteTomCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderreceb.xMun CteTomCep = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderreceb.CEP CteTomUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderreceb.UF CteTomPaiCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderreceb.cPais) CteTomPaiNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderreceb.xPais CteTomEml = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.email EndCase
//CteTomModDoc //CteTomSerDoc //CteTomSubSerDoc //CteTomNroDoc //CteTomVlrDoc //CteTomDtaEmsDoc //CteTomChvEmt //CteTomChvAna //CteTomChvCpl //CteTomChvAnaOri //CteTomDtaEmsDec
CteDadAdiTra = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.compl.xCaracAd CteDadAdiSer = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.compl.xCaracSer //CteObsGer CteObsAut = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.compl.xObs
If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.CNPJ.IsEmpty() or not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.CPF.IsEmpty() If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.CNPJ.IsEmpty() &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.CNPJ Else &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.CPF EndIf Do 'GetPessoa' CteRemCod = &PEsCod CteRemCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.CNPJ CteRemCpf = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.CPF CteRemIns = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.IE CteRemRaz = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.xNome CteRemFan = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.xFant CteRemFon = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.fone CteRemLog = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.xLgr CteRemNro = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.EnderReme.nro CteRemCpl = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.xCpl CteRemBai = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.xBairro CteRemCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.cMun) CteRemCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.xMun CteRemUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.UF CteRemCep = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.CEP CteRemPaiCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.cPais) CteRemPaiNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.xPais CteRemEml = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.Email EndIf
If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CNPJ.IsEmpty() or not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CPF.IsEmpty() If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CNPJ.IsEmpty() &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CNPJ Else &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CPF EndIf
Do 'GetPessoa'
CteExpCod = &PesCod CteExpCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CNPJ CteExpCpf = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CPF CteExpIns = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.IE CteExpRaz = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.xNome CteExpLog = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.xLgr CteExpNro = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.nro CteExpCpl = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.xCpl CteExpBai = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.xBairro CteExpCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.cMun) CteExpCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.xMun CteExpUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.UF CteExpCep = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.CEP CteExpPaiCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.cPais) CteExpPaiNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.xPais CteExpEml = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.Email EndIf
If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CNPJ.IsEmpty() or not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CPF.IsEmpty() If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CNPJ.IsEmpty() &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CNPJ Else &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CPF EndIf
Do 'GetPessoa' CteRecCod = &PesCod CteRecCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CNPJ CteRecCpf = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CPF CteRecIns = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.iE CteRecRaz = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.xNome CteRecFon =&SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.Fone CteRecLog = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.xLgr CteRecNro = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.nro CteRecCpl =&SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.xCpl CteRecBai = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.xBairro CteRecCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.cMun) CteRecCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.xMun CteRecCep = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.cEP CteRecUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.UF CteRecPaiCod = Val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.cPais) CteRecPaiNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.xPais CteRecEml= &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.email EndIf
If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CNPJ.IsEmpty() or not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CPF.IsEmpty() If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CNPJ.IsEmpty() &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CNPJ Else &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CPF EndIf Do 'GetPessoa' CteDesCod = &PEsCod CteDesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CNPJ CteDesCpf = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CPF CteDesIns = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.iE CteDesRaz = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.xNome CteDesLog = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xLgr CteDesNro = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.nro CteDesCpl = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xcpl CteDesBai = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xBairro CteDesCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.cMun) CteDesCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xMun CteDesCep = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.CEP CteDesUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.UF CteDesPaiCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.cpais) CteDesPaiNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xpais CteDesEml = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.Email EndIf
CteVlrTotPreSer = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.vPrest.vTPrest) CteVlrRecSer = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.vPrest.vRec)
Do Case Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS00.CST = '00' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Normal Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS45.CST = '40' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Isento Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS60.CST = '60' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Substituicao Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS20.CST = '20' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Reduzida Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS45.CST = '41' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.naoTributada Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS45.CST = '51' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.deferido Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS90.CST = '90' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Outros Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMSSN.indSN = '1' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Simples EndCase
//////// CteImpVbc //////// CteImpPerRed //////// CteImpAli //////// CteImpVlr //////// CteImpVbcRet //////// CteImpVstRet //////// CteImpAliRet //////// CteImpVlrCre //////// CteImpVlrIcmUfe //////// CteConSplNac //////// CteImpAliTotTri //////// CteImpVlrTotTri //////// CteImpObsFis
//CteImpOrdVlrPis //CteImpOrdVlrCof //CteImpOrdVlrIpr //CteImpOrdVlrInss //CteImpOrdVlrCsll //CteSerDes //CteCarVlrTotAvb
CteCarVlrTot = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infCarga.vCarga) CteCarProPre = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infCarga.proPred CteCarOtrCar = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infCarga.xOutCat //CteFatNro //CteFatVlr //CteFatVlrDes //CteFatVlrLiq //CteChvSub //CteChvTom
CteModRodRNTRC = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.rodo.RNTRC
//CteModRodLot = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.rodo.lota //CteModRodCol = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.rodo. //CteModRodTaf //CteModRodNroRegEst //////// CtePosPre
CteAutNumPro = &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.nProt CteArqXml= &CteArqXml CteAutSts = &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.cStat CteAutDigVal = &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.digVal CteAutDatHorRec = &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.dhRecbto
//############################################ CteSts = Status_NFe.Importada CteAutMsg = &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.cStat // grava o status aqui para poder importar depois na proxima tela //##############################################
CteEnvEml = NfeEnvEml.Enviado CteStsImp = 'S'
//////// CtePosDup //////// CtePosVei //////// CtePosDocAnt EndNew &CteCarCod = 0 For &SdtXmlCteInfQi In &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infCarga.infQI &CteCarCod +=1 New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod CteCod = &CteCod CteCarCod = &CteCarCod Do Case Case &SdtXmlCteInfQi.cUnid = '00' CteCarUnd = UnidadeMedidaCte.m3 Case &SdtXmlCteInfQi.cUnid = '01' CteCarUnd = UnidadeMedidaCte.KG Case &SdtXmlCteInfQi.cUnid = '02' CteCarUnd = UnidadeMedidaCte.TON Case &SdtXmlCteInfQi.cUnid = '03' CteCarUnd = UnidadeMedidaCte.UNIDADE Case &SdtXmlCteInfQi.cUnid = '04' CteCarUnd = UnidadeMedidaCte.LITROS Case &SdtXmlCteInfQi.cUnid = '05' CteCarUnd = UnidadeMedidaCte.MMBTU EndCase
CteCarQtd = val(&SdtXmlCteInfQi.qCarga) CteCarTip = &SdtXmlCteInfQi.tpMed CtecarIns = 'A' EndNew EndFor
&CteDocCod = 0 For &SdtXmlCteinfDoc In &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infDoc.infNFee &CteDocCod +=1 New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod CteCod = &CteCod CteDocTip = TipoDocumentoCte.Nfe CteDocCod = &CteDocCod CteDocChvNfe = &SdtXmlCteinfDoc.chave EndNew EndFor
For &SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff In &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infDoc.infNFF &CteDocCod +=1 New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod CteCod = &CteCod CteDocCod = &CteDocCod CteDocNroRom = &SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.nRoma CteDocNroPed = &SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.nPed CteDocTip = TipoDocumentoCte.NF &dhEmi = substr(&SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.dEmi,9,2) +'/'+ substr(&SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.dEmi,6,2) +'/'+ substr(&SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.dEmi,1,4) CteDocDta = CtoD(&dhEmi) DO Case Case &SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.mod = '04' CteDocMod = ModeloNotaCte.Produtor Case &SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.mod = '01' CteDocMod = ModeloNotaCte.AVULSA1A EndCase
CteDocSer = &SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.serie CteDocNro = &SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.nDoc CteDocCfoPre = val(&SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.nCFOP) CteDocVlrTotPro = val(&SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.vProd) CteDocVlrTotNtf = val(&SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.vNF) CteDocVbc = val(&SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.vBC) CteDocVlrIcm = val(&SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.vICMS) CteDocVstIcm = val(&SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.vBCST) CteDocVst = val(&SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.vST) CteDocPes = val(&SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.nPeso) EndNew
EndFor For &SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross In &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infDoc.infOutross &CteDocCod +=1 New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod CteCod = &CteCod CteDocCod = &CteDocCod Do Case Case &SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.tpDoc = '99' CteDocTipOri = DocumentoOriginario.Outros Case &SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.tpDoc = '00' CteDocTipOri = DocumentoOriginario.DEclaracao Case &SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.tpDoc = '10' CteDocTipOri = DocumentoOriginario.DUtoviario Case &SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.tpDoc = '59' CteDocTipOri = DocumentoOriginario.CFeSAT Case &SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.tpDoc = '65' CteDocTipOri = DocumentoOriginario.NFCe EndCASE
CteDocDes = &SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.descOutros If not &SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.dPrev.IsEmpty() &dhEmi = substr(&SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.dPrev,9,2) +'/'+ substr(&SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.dPrev,6,2) +'/'+ substr(&SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.dPrev,1,4) CteDocDtaPre = CtoD(&dhEmi) EndIf CteDocTip = TipoDocumentoCte.Otros
&dhEmi = substr(&SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.dEmi,9,2) +'/'+ substr(&SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.dEmi,6,2) +'/'+ substr(&SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.dEmi,1,4) CteDocDta = CtoD(&dhEmi) CteDocNro = &SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.nDoc EndNew
EndFor EndFor EndIf commit
Sub 'GetPessoa' &PesCod= 0 If &PesCnpj.Length() >= 14 &PesCnpj = RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(&PesCnpj) EndIf
For each order EmpCod,PesCnpj Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(PesCnpj) = &PesCnpj or PesCpf = &PesCnpj when not &PesCnpj.IsEmpty() &PesCod = PesCod Exit EndFor EndSub
